author: The Works of John Cassian
book: The Seven Books of John Cassian on the Incarnation of the Lord, Against Nestorius.

classification.cautionReason: This work discusses heresy in order to refute it; do not classify it as heretical merely from its title.

lineage: The Seven Books of John Cassian on the Incarnation of the Lord, Against Nestorius.
Chapter XI. He supports the same doctrine by proofs from the gospel.

ccel.title: NPNF-211. Sulpitius Severus, Vincent of Lerins, John Cassian

title: Chapter XI. He supports the same doctrine by proofs from the gospel.

source.title: NPNF-211. Sulpitius Severus, Vincent of Lerins, John Cassian

verses.book: The Seven Books of John Cassian on the Incarnation of the Lord, Against Nestorius.
verses.text: But perhaps it is a difficulty to you that all this time I am chiefly using the witness of the Apostle Paul alone.

verses.book: The Seven Books of John Cassian on the Incarnation of the Lord, Against Nestorius.
verses.text: He is good enough for me, whom God chose, nor do I blush to call as the witness to my faith, the man whom God willed to be the teacher of the whole world.

verses.book: The Seven Books of John Cassian on the Incarnation of the Lord, Against Nestorius.
verses.text: But to yield to your wishes, as perhaps you fancy that I have no other proofs to use, hear the perfect mystery of man’s salvation and eternal bliss, which Martha proclaims in the gospel.

verses.book: The Seven Books of John Cassian on the Incarnation of the Lord, Against Nestorius.
The Seven Books of John Cassian on the Incarnation of the Lord, Against Nestorius.
verses.text: “Of a truth, Lord, I have believed that Thou art the Christ, the Son of the living God, who art come into this world.”

verses.book: The Seven Books of John Cassian on the Incarnation of the Lord, Against Nestorius.
verses.text: Learn the true faith from a woman.

verses.book: The Seven Books of John Cassian on the Incarnation of the Lord, Against Nestorius.
verses.text: Learn the confession of eternal hope.

verses.book: The Seven Books of John Cassian on the Incarnation of the Lord, Against Nestorius.
verses.text: Yet you have a splendid consolation: you need not blush to be taught the mystery of salvation by her, whose testimony God did not refuse to accept.
